title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: libinput bug fix and enhancement update

full_text:
An update for libinput is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

libinput is a library that handles input devices for display servers and other applications that need to directly deal with input devices.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [libinput] Backport Wacom Intuos Pro 3rd Gen to RHEL10 [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-104952)  [DELL 9.6 BUG]Touchpad does not work properly, cursor movement lag [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-106932)
